list.pageSubtitle: Organize catalog groups; removing a category hides its products on the storefront

empty.title: No categories yet
empty.subtitle: Create a category to group products.

modal.title: Delete category?
modal.body: <bold>{{name}}</bold> may contain products. This action <bold>removes the category from the public storefront</bold> (soft delete). Products stay in admin but are hidden from shoppers until you move them to another category.
modal.noProducts: This category currently has no products assigned.
modal.withProducts_one: This category currently has {{count}} product assigned.
modal.withProducts_other: This category currently has {{count}} products assigned.

toasts.removed: Category removed. Linked products are hidden from the storefront.

form.title: New category
form.subtitle: Add a category for organizing products in the catalog

fields.nameEnHint: Used as the base for the URL slug when possible
fields.descriptionHint: Optional — shown where category text is used
fields.active: Active (visible in storefront when not frozen)
fields.frozen: Frozen (admin-only; blocks new products using this category)
